

if game:GetService("CoreGui"):FindFirstChild("ToraScript") then
  game:GetService("CoreGui").ToraScript:Destroy()
end
local library = loadstring(game:HttpGet("https://raw.githubusercontent.com/liebertsx/Tora-Library/main/src/librarynew", true))()
local window = library:CreateWindow("Steal a Brainrot MOD")
getgenv().yourTycoon = nil
for _, descendant in pairs(workspace.Plots:GetDescendants()) do
  if descendant.Name == "YourBase" and descendant.Enabled == true then
    getgenv().yourTycoon = descendant.Parent.Parent
  end
end
window:AddToggle({
  text = "Steal Best in Server",
  flag = "toggle",
  state = false,
  callback = function(value)
    _G.Steal = value
    print("Steal: ", value)
    if value then
      Steal()
    end
  end,
})
function Steal()
  spawn(function()
    _G.Steal = true
    while _G.Steal do
      wait()
      pcall(function()
        local player = game:GetService("Players").LocalPlayer
        local humanoidRootPart = (player.Character or player.CharacterAdded:Wait()):WaitForChild("HumanoidRootPart")
        local function parseMoney(text)
          text = text:upper():gsub("[$,à¸¿%s]", "")
          local moneyValue = tonumber(text:match("%d+%.?%d*"))
          if not moneyValue then
            return nil
          end
          if text:find("K") then
            return moneyValue * 1000
          end
          if text:find("M") then
            return moneyValue * 1000000
          end
          if text:find("B") then
            return moneyValue * 1000000000
          end
          if moneyValue >= 1000 then
            return moneyValue
          end
          return nil
        end
        local bestValue = -math.huge
        local bestPrompt = nil
        local bestCFrame = nil
        for _, descendant in pairs(workspace.Plots:GetDescendants()) do
          if descendant:IsA("TextLabel") and descendant.Name == "Price" and descendant.Parent.Name == "AnimalOverhead" then
            local success, isNotOwned = pcall(function()
              return descendant.Parent.Parent.Parent.Parent.Parent.Parent.Parent.PlotSign.YourBase.Enabled == false
            end)
            if success and isNotOwned then
              local value = parseMoney(descendant.Text)
              if value and bestValue < value then
                bestValue = value
                bestCFrame = descendant.Parent.Parent.Parent.CFrame
                bestPrompt = descendant.Parent.Parent.Parent:FindFirstChild("PromptAttachment") and descendant.Parent.Parent.Parent.PromptAttachment:FindFirstChild("ProximityPrompt")
              end
            end
          end
        end
        if bestCFrame and bestPrompt then
          humanoidRootPart.CFrame = bestCFrame + Vector3.new(0, 3, 0)
          task.wait(0.1)
          fireproximityprompt(bestPrompt)
        end
        task.spawn(function()
          if getgenv().yourTycoon ~= nil then
            for _, child in pairs(getgenv().yourTycoon:GetChildren()) do
              if child.Name == "DeliveryHitbox" then
                game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character.HumanoidRootPart.CFrame = CFrame.new(child.Position)
              end
            end
          end
        end)
        wait()
      end)
    end
  end)
end
window:AddToggle({
  text = "Auto Locked",
  flag = "toggle",
  state = false,
  callback = function(value)
    _G.Locked = value
    print("Locked: ", value)
    if value then
      Locked()
    end
  end,
})
function Locked()
  spawn(function()
    _G.Locked = true
    while _G.Locked do
      wait()
      pcall(function()
        getgenv().yourTycoon = nil
        for _, descendant in pairs(workspace.Plots:GetDescendants()) do
          if descendant.Name == "YourBase" and descendant.Enabled == true then
            getgenv().yourTycoon = descendant.Parent.Parent
          end
        end
        task.spawn(function()
          if getgenv().yourTycoon ~= nil then
            for _, child in pairs(getgenv().yourTycoon.Purchases.PlotBlock:GetChildren()) do
              if child.Name == "Hitbox" and child.Parent.Main.BillboardGui.Locked.Visible == false then
                firetouchinterest(game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character.HumanoidRootPart, child, 0)
                wait()
                firetouchinterest(game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character.HumanoidRootPart, child, 1)
              end
            end
          end
        end)
        wait()
      end)
    end
  end)
end
window:AddToggle({
  text = "Collect Cash",
  flag = "toggle",
  state = false,
  callback = function(value)
    _G.Cash = value
    print("Cash: ", value)
    if value then
      Cash()
    end
  end,
})
function Cash()
  spawn(function()
    _G.Cash = true
    while _G.Cash do
      wait()
      pcall(function()
        getgenv().yourTycoon = nil
        for _, descendant in pairs(workspace.Plots:GetDescendants()) do
          if descendant.Name == "YourBase" and descendant.Enabled == true then
            getgenv().yourTycoon = descendant.Parent.Parent
          end
        end
        task.spawn(function()
          if getgenv().yourTycoon ~= nil then
            for _, descendant in pairs(getgenv().yourTycoon.AnimalPodiums:GetDescendants()) do
              if descendant.Name == "Claim" then
                firetouchinterest(game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character.HumanoidRootPart, descendant.Hitbox, 0)
                wait(1)
                firetouchinterest(game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character.HumanoidRootPart, descendant.Hitbox, 1)
              end
            end
          end
        end)
        for _, descendant in pairs(workspace:GetDescendants()) do
          if descendant.ClassName == "ProximityPrompt" then
            descendant.HoldDuration = 0
          end
        end
        wait(3)
      end)
    end
  end)
end
window:AddButton({
  text = "Remove Walls",
  flag = "button",
  callback = function()
    for _, descendant in pairs(workspace.Plots:GetDescendants()) do
      if descendant.Name == "InvisibleWalls" or string.find(descendant.Name, "Side") then
        descendant:Destroy()
      end
    end
  end,
})
window:AddButton({
  text = "Inf Jump",
  flag = "button",
  callback = function()
    game:GetService("UserInputService").JumpRequest:Connect(function()
      game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character:FindFirstChildOfClass("Humanoid"):ChangeState("Jumping")
    end)
  end,
})
window:AddLabel({
  text = "YouTube: Tora IsMe",
})
library:Init()
game:GetService("ProximityPromptService").PromptButtonHoldBegan:Connect(function(prompt)
  fireproximityprompt(prompt)
end)Began:Connect(function(prompt)
  fireproximityprompt(prompt)
end)
